name: servine
flavor_texts: It moves along the ground as if sliding. Its swift movements befuddle its foes, and it then attacks with a vine whip.
They avoid attacks by sinking into the shadows of thick foliage. They retaliate with masterful whipping techniques.
When it gets dirty, its leaves can’t be used in photosynthesis, so it always keeps itself clean.
text: Servine is the Grass Snake Pokémon. It is a grass-type Pokémon. Abilities: overgrow, contrary (hidden). Base stats — HP: 60, Attack: 60, Defense: 75, Sp. Atk: 60, Sp. Def: 75, Speed: 83. Evolution line: snivy → servine → serperior. Lore: It moves along the ground as if sliding. Its swift movements befuddle its foes, and it then attacks with a vine whip. They avoid attacks by sinking into the shadows of thick foliage. They retaliate with masterful whipping techniques. When it gets dirty, its leaves can’t be used in photosynthesis, so it always keeps itself clean.
